reason: Migrate Botswana VAT to one reviewed local engine across English, French and Swahili. Current BURS material and Botswana's 2025 VAT reform Bill support the 14% standard rate. BURS material supports compulsory registration above BWP 1 million over 12 months and voluntary registration from BWP 500,000 through BWP 1 million subject to approval. Zero-rating, exemption and the 2026 remote-digital-services transition remain confirmation-only. The change corrects the false 15% from April 2025 claim and removes unsupported generic VAT-withholding presets while preserving deterministic two-decimal add, extract and invoice arithmetic. Eight unit checks and four browser tests cover executable behavior; no protected golden fixture existed, so there is no carried result delta.
